_comment: Test fixture for the Charon Git tool (apps/core-daemon/tools/git_tool.py). Each case maps directly to a supported action in execute_git(). 'content_contains' strings are substrings expected anywhere in ToolResult.content.

cases.description: status action on a repo with no uncommitted changes should report the branch name and a clean working tree.
cases.setup: Initialise a bare git repo, create an initial commit so HEAD exists, leave working tree untouched.

cases.description: status action when there are unstaged modifications should list the changed file(s) with a status flag (e.g. 'M' for modified).
cases.setup: Initialise a git repo with at least one committed file, then modify that file without staging the change.

cases.description: diff action shows the stat summary and the actual diff hunks for modified tracked files.
cases.setup: Initialise a repo with a committed file (e.g. README.md). Append a line to that file so there is an unstaged diff to display.

cases.description: diff action with a specific file path in 'files' should scope the diff output to that file only.
cases.setup: Initialise a repo with README.md and another_file.txt both committed. Modify both files. The diff should only mention README.md.

cases.description: commit action with a non-empty message auto-stages all changes, creates a commit, and returns the git commit summary line.

input.message: feat: add initial agent contract definitions

cases.setup: Initialise a repo with a configured user.email and user.name. Create or modify a tracked file so there is something to stage and commit.

content_contains: feat: add initial agent contract definitions

cases.description: commit action when the working tree is already clean should return a human-readable message instead of an error, because there is nothing to commit.

input.message: chore: attempt commit on clean tree

cases.setup: Initialise a repo and create an initial commit. Do not modify any files afterwards so the working tree is clean.

cases.description: commit action with an empty or blank message should fail immediately with a validation error before touching the index.
cases.setup: Any valid git repository (the error is triggered before git is invoked).

cases.description: branch action with a new branch name creates that branch and switches to it, returning a confirmation message.
cases.setup: Initialise a repo with at least one commit so that a branch can be created from HEAD.

cases.description: branch action with no branch name lists all local (and remote-tracking) branches.
cases.setup: Initialise a repo with at least one commit and two local branches (e.g. main and feature/x).

cases.description: checkout action with the name of an existing branch switches HEAD to that branch and returns a confirmation.
cases.setup: Initialise a repo with a main branch and a feature branch. Start on the feature branch so that checking out main is a real switch.

cases.description: checkout action when branch param is absent or empty should fail with a validation error.
log action returns the current branch name followed by one-line commit entries for recent commits.
cases.setup: Initialise a repo and create at least three commits with distinct messages so the log is non-trivial.

cases.description: Passing an unrecognised action string should return an error listing the valid actions.
